name: Sergeant Borin
personality: Former soldier, now village protector. Stern, suspicious of strangers, but loyal to those who prove themselves. Speaks in commands and short sentences. Calls people 'citizen' or 'stranger' until trusted. Checks weapons at the gate. Doesn't take bribes, but appreciates respect. Has a soft spot for orphans. Uses military terms: 'halt', 'state your business', 'move along'. If insulted, warns once. If threatened, draws steel.
